description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a combination of flat and sloped roof sections, accented by a prominent central chimney. The exterior is primarily composed of dark and light panels, creating a striking contrast, and includes large overhangs and a cantilevered section. Multiple levels are visible, with open interior spaces and a staircase leading to an elevated entryway. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more discreet. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete, metal, and glass, with visible support beams and a partially open lower level. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, multi-level house with a mix of flat and sloped roofs, dark and light exterior panels, and large overhangs. Features asymmetrical windows, a central chimney, and a cantilevered section.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main overhang, central chimney, and a staircase leading to the entryway, with a clear view of the flat and sloped roof sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sloped roof, cantilevered section, and a large window, with the staircase visible leading up to the entry.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the angular roof design, minimal window openings, and the continuation of the exterior panel contrast.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the open lower level, additional windows, and the prominent chimney, with the roof's slope clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Elevated entry with steps, overhang, and minimalistic door design
